test.details: 2 packages tested: @galileo/shared (40 tests, 3 files) and @galileo/api (17 tests, 2 files). All 57 tests passed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update backend-worker skill to document Prisma 7 patterns: prisma.config.ts with defineConfig, @prisma/adapter-pg driver adapter, PrismaClient import from generated path (src/generated/prisma/client.js), and PrismaClient instantiation with adapter. Feature descriptions referencing Prisma should expect v7 patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature api-setup-prisma worker had to adapt implementation to Prisma 7 breaking changes vs feature description assumptions (noted in worker handoff discoveredIssues and skillFeedback).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider updating backend-worker skill's testing guidance: for complex auth endpoints requiring fully wired Fastify app with Prisma + JWT, implement minimal working code first then write tests (rather than strict red-green TDD), since test scaffolding depends on app building correctly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature api-auth-endpoints worker noted in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges that strict test-first approach was impractical for auth endpoint wiring.
